2026-06-22GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement between Canada and Australia on Cooperation and Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs MattersOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between Canada and Australia on Cooperation and Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters, done at Wellington on 19 November 2025.N/A
subject: Agreement between Canada and Australia on Cooperation and Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between Canada and Australia on Cooperation and Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters, done at Wellington on 19 November 2025.
